module.name: no-banned-types
module.description: Ban ReturnType and indexed access types.

scenarios.name: should allow explicit return type annotations that are not ReturnType
scenarios.given: a function with a concrete return type annotation

scenarios.name: should allow standard utility types such as Partial or Readonly
should report the use of ReturnType<typeof fn>
scenarios.given: a type annotation using ReturnType<typeof someFunction>

scenarios.name: should report indexed access types such as Obj['key']
scenarios.given: a type annotation using an indexed access type T['key']
